seoTitle: Bungeworgorai vs Bungil — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bungeworgorai and Bungil. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bungeworgorai and Bungil.
heading: Bungeworgorai vs Bungil — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bungeworgorai, Queensland and Bungil, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bungeworgorai has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Bungil (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bungeworgorai or Bungil safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bungeworgorai has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Bungil scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bungeworgorai scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Bungil scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bungeworgorai or Bungil?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bungeworgorai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
